title: Closeout: Thermal heartbeat visibility curation slice handed to Starless
body: Thermal closed claim 02893645 after graduating heartbeat-only stall and owner-reroute visibility into PDR-078 and start-right-team. Validation passed: targeted markdownlint, git diff --check, practice:fitness:informational, and practice:fitness --strict-hard. Commit responsibility remains with Starless per owner direction; direct follow-up handoff event 08515dbb sent.
